title: IT Services & Solutions
summary: Managed IT, networking, cybersecurity and cloud transformation for enterprises across Kuwait and India.
details: Our IT services practice helps growing enterprises modernise their infrastructure without disrupting operations. From day-to-day managed services to multi-year transformation roadmaps, we provide certified engineers and 24x7 support contracts tailored to the GCC and Indian markets.

title: Fiber Optics & Structured Cabling
summary: OFC backbones, FTTx rollouts and Cat6/6A/7 structured cabling for data centres and commercial facilities.
details: Nexatel is one of the region's preferred partners for high-density structured cabling and fiber optic backbones. Our certified technicians deliver fully tested installations with full BICSI-aligned documentation, OTDR reports and warranty support.

title: Telecom Infrastructure
summary: End-to-end telecom installation including towers, in-building solutions, IP-PBX and unified communications.
details: We partner with national carriers, system integrators and enterprises to deliver telecom infrastructure that just works. From core IP-PBX rollouts to multi-site DAS coverage in malls, hospitals and high-rises, we own the project end to end.

title: Electrical, Solar & Energy
summary: Licensed electrical installation, rooftop solar PV systems and energy-efficiency retrofits.
details: Our electrical and energy division is licensed for low- and medium-voltage installations and certified by leading PV inverter and panel manufacturers. We deliver turn-key solar projects from feasibility and financing to commissioning and O&M.

title: IT Hardware Supply
summary: Sourcing and supply of laptops, servers, networking gear and audio-visual equipment from tier-1 OEMs.
details: Through long-standing OEM relationships in the GCC and India, we offer competitive pricing on tier-1 hardware backed by warranty registration, asset tagging and on-site delivery. Bulk and rate-contract pricing available for government and enterprise tenders.
